title: T-021 — UI: OEE-ADM-002 Shift Configs read-only viewer (oee_shift_configs_page, 15-OEE-e)
prompt:
# T-021 — OEE-ADM-002 Shift Configs viewer UI

PRD: docs/prd/15-OEE-PRD.md §15.3 OEE-ADM-002, §15.7 + UX prototypes/design/15-OEE-UX.md:805-834
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/screens.jsx:836-900 (oee_shift_configs_page)

## Goal
Server Component admin page `/oee/shift-configs` rendering read-only shift_configs table + DSL rule status section (shift_aggregator_v1 from rule_definitions). Gated by oee_admin role via middleware. Read-only by design (writes happen via OEE-ADM-003 T-022 + 02-SETTINGS reference-tables UI). Matches prototype 1:1.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/(oee)/shift-configs/page.tsx` (RSC): middleware redirect if role !== oee_admin (V-OEE-ACCESS-2); reads shift_configs (T-003) + rule_definitions row WHERE rule_id='shift_aggregator_v1' (T-008).
2. Table shape per prototype: shift_id, shift_label, start_time, end_time, timezone, active_days, sort_order, is_active.
3. DSL rule status section: shows rule_id + version + phase + active flag + last_fired_at (joined via worker job_runs or last outbox event).
4. Two cross-link buttons: "Edit in 02-SETTINGS" → Next.js `<Link href="/settings/reference-tables/shift-configs">`; "Check Rule Status" → `<Link href="/reporting/rules-usage">`.
5. RTL test snapshot + parity checklist against prototype line range.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(oee)/shift-configs/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/shift-configs/_components/shift-configs-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/shift-configs/_components/__tests__/shift-configs-client.test.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/screens.jsx:836-900 (oee_shift_configs_page), then it has the read-only shift_configs table + DSL rule status section + cross-link buttons — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist.
2. Given a user without oee_admin role requests /oee/shift-configs, when middleware runs, then it redirects to /oee (V-OEE-ACCESS-2).
3. Given shift_aggregator_v1 row exists in rule_definitions, when page renders, then the DSL rule status card shows rule_id, version, phase='P1', active=TRUE.
4. Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect evidence, then UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact + Playwright trace per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL test asserting parity + middleware redirect + rule status rendering.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run app/(oee)/shift-configs`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not include any edit/write UI — read-only by design (writes happen via OEE-ADM-003 T-022 + 02-SETTINGS).
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not skip middleware role gate.
- Do not use HTML <table> — shadcn Table with TanStack Table for sortability (matches other admin tables).
- Do not skip cross-link buttons — translation note explicitly requires them.

pipeline_inputs.description: OEE-ADM-002 read-only shift_configs viewer + DSL rule status section + cross-link to 02-SETTINGS reference tables, matches oee_shift_configs_page prototype.
